key_finding: STRONG: Forward-looking probing at computation positions. V→final_answer R=0.635 at L35 (text R=-0.034). Partial correlation V→final|local R=0.520 — V carries info about final answer BEYOND local computation step. WRRA: 71.4% correct-alignment at L27 (p=0.039, n=21). Plain-text format yields 7.7x more arithmetic errors than calculator. 10/10 TRUE-hypothesis predictions confirmed.
evidence_impact: STRONG evidence for the hidden channel hypothesis. The partial correlation (R=0.520) directly addresses the 'richer representations' confound from exp_076-077 — V carries UNIQUE information about the final answer at intermediate computation positions that cannot be explained by local computation alone. WRRA provides first marginally significant evidence that KV encodes correct values at error positions.
next_planned: Cross-model replication of forward-looking probing on Mistral-7B; residualize against problem numbers; WRRA with weaker model for more error positions.

null_space_existence.status: CONFIRMED in K-space (p=0.013). Narrow but real. Qwen-specific.

spatial_structure.status: DECISIVELY DISCONFIRMED for selectivity. HEAD-LEVEL CONCENTRATION decisive on Qwen, weak on Llama.

positional_dissociation.status: Complete. Head x position interaction is encoding-dependent.

geometric_dissociation.status: K > V UNIVERSAL: 8 angles. K spectral geometry uniform across heads. V spectral differentiates.

head_level_analysis.status: COMPLETE + SPECTRAL: Two-regime on Qwen (decisive), near-collapse on Llama.

natural_usage.status: STRONG: Forward-looking probing — V→final R=0.635, partial R=0.520 after controlling for local result (exp_078). WRRA: 71.4% correct-alignment at L27 (p=0.039). CumV > cumText on 2 models (exp_076-077). Plain-text format produces 7.7x more errors than calculator.

cross_model_replication.status: COMPLETE for Phase 1 (4 families). Phase 2: cumV > cumText replicated on 2 families (Qwen, Mistral). Forward-looking probing on Qwen only — needs replication.
